meats.name: Hot Dog
meats.description: Cheap and quick to cook. Good for beginners learning the basics.

meats.name: Chicken
meats.description: A solid early-game meat with decent profit margins. Cooks at moderate speed.

meats.name: Pork
meats.description: Reliable mid-tier meat. Good profit when cooked perfectly.

meats.name: Salmon
meats.description: High-value fish with excellent perfect cook bonus. Burns easily if mistimed.

meats.name: Steak
meats.description: Premium meat with strong profit. Requires good timing for perfect cooks.

meats.name: Ribeye
meats.description: Top-tier steak with massive perfect cook bonus. High risk, high reward.

meats.name: Dragon Ribs
meats.description: The rarest and most profitable meat. Extremely high perfect cook value but long cook time and high burn penalty.

_disclaimer: All values are estimates based on community data. Actual in-game values may differ after updates.
